# DevLoop Provider Context
# Auto-generated by `devloop agent-sync` — 2026-05-09 02:19

## Active Configuration
- **Main provider** (orchestrator/architect/reviewer): Claude
- **Worker provider** (work/fix): Copilot

## Provider CLI Quick Reference

### Claude
- **Install:** `curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash`
- **Non-interactive:** `echo "prompt" | claude -p --model sonnet`
- **Models:** sonnet (balanced), opus (most capable), haiku (fast/cheap)
- **Remote control:** supported via claude.ai browser / mobile app
- **Hooks:** `~/.claude/settings.json` (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop)
- **MCP:** `.mcp.json` (project) or `~/.claude.json` (global)
- **Sub-agents:** `.claude/agents/*.md` — launched via Task tool
- **Docs:** https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview

### Copilot
- **Install:** `npm install -g @github/copilot`
- **Non-interactive:** `echo "/plan <prompt>" | copilot`
- **Remote control:** supported (Copilot coding agent)
- **Instructions:** `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- **Skills:** `.github/copilot/skills/` and `.copilot/`
- **Docs:** https://docs.github.com/en/copilot

### OpenCode (worker-only)
- **Install:** `npm install -g opencode`
- **Non-interactive:** `opencode run --file spec.md "instruction"`
- **Remote control:** NOT supported
- **Config:** `opencode.json` in project root
- **Docs:** https://opencode.ai/docs/cli/

### Pi (worker-only)
- **Install:** see https://pi.dev/docs/latest
- **Non-interactive:** `pi --mode json "prompt"` (JSONL event stream)
- **Remote control:** NOT supported
- **Docs:** https://pi.dev/docs/latest

## DevLoop Invocation Matrix

| Provider | Role | Command | Prompt prefix |
|----------|------|---------|--------------|
| claude | main+worker | `echo "$prompt" | claude -p --model $model` | none |
| copilot | main+worker | `echo "$prompt" | copilot` | /plan |
| opencode | worker only | `opencode run --file spec.md "instruction"` | none |
| pi | worker only | `pi --mode json "$prompt"` | none |
